items.checkin_comment:
Dry, piney citrus, great balance.
These guys have got the juice, punching out some cracking beers!

user.bio: Chef/Storeman , sneaker collector, vinyl head, craft beer bloke! Portland Blazers n Ess. Bomber!

items.badge_description: It's New Brew Thursday! Drink any beer you have never had before on three different Thursdays in a 20 day period.
We believe in IPA and you should too. You certainly have a taste for the hops! That's 10 different IPAs. Try 5 more for Level 3! Want to learn more about this badge? Check out our podcast

Thanks for staying at home, and checking in with Untappd! It allows us to stay connected to a community of beer lovers, just like you, even if we can't be in the same physical location. From our home to yours, cheers and stay safe!

user.bio: Love trying all the different beers, and dont mind a good scotch. Ratings are mine on style and taste for that style.
Omnivore who appreciates detailed comments on beers. IG: Food pairings @barnovemberlima Travels @ramblingfeet
Life's too short for crappy beer.  Drink the good stuff.
user.location: Chattanooga, TN and formerly from Alexandria, VA

user.bio: You never poopoo a beer right off; it usually takes a while before that happens - paraphrasing Homer Simpson
You can find me on Instagram mr_al_pal
Travel for both business and pleasure. Very fortunate to have had some amazing beers around the world.
